title: Response Decision (Silence)
description: Private artifact produced when an actor chooses NOT to speak in a round. Never visible to other actors or the blind adjudicator. Records WHY the actor stayed silent and WHAT they would have said.

turn_id.description: Same turn_id as the corresponding silence marker in the transcript

decision.description: Always SILENT — this schema only exists when the actor declines to speak

reason_private.description: Actor's private natural-language explanation of why they are staying silent

reason_category.description: Machine-readable category of silence motivation, used by replay analyst. STRATEGIC_POWER_MOVE = 'your challenge is beneath me', UNABLE_TO_REFUTE = disengage rather than concede, EMOTIONAL_WITHDRAWAL = overwhelmed, TOPIC_DISENGAGEMENT = not my fight, RISK_AVOIDANCE = speaking hurts me, WAITING_FOR_BETTER_MOMENT = strategic patience, CONTEMPT_DISMISSAL = discussion is beneath me, DRIVE_BY_COMPLETE = bomb dropped, mission accomplished.

inner_monologue.description: Character-voice internal monologue about why they're going silent. Same voice-fidelity rules as think.private.json inner_monologue — must match education_level, speech_style, age_range, topic_relevance.

perceived_cost_of_speaking.description: What the actor believes they lose by speaking

perceived_cost_of_silence.description: What the actor believes they lose by being silent

target_turn_refs_intended.description: Turns the actor would have referenced if they chose to speak

would_have_said.description: What the actor would have said if they chose to speak. Only visible to replay analyst. Must be in character voice.

confidence_in_decision.description: How confident the actor is in their silence decision
